recentReports.summary: 60-day stamp consistently granted at Suvarnabhumi for US passport holders since Nov 2024.

groundTruthNotes: Return ticket increasingly checked at budget airline check-in counters.
Remote workers advised not to disclose work status at immigration.
data.enforcementReality: Relaxed for air entry. Land crossings see more scrutiny for repeat entrants.
commonIssues: Repeated land crossings within one year flagged
